series_metadata.series_description: Documents allowing access to classified information, and compliance with DHS security protocols, in furtherance of the DHS Classified National Security Information (CNSI) program, administered by the STACC/SAIC. This includes, but not limited to: SVTC and briefing rosters, VARs, Perm Cert approvals visitor logs and sign-in sheets, DPS badging requests, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: one (1) year ; Electronic: one (1) year
